arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca CONFIRMS Chelsea transfer decision
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has insisted that Chelsea don’t need to sign a “killer” centre forward, despite Nicolas Jackson ’s recent woes in front of goal. Jackson has failed to score since Chelsea’s 2-1 win over Brentford on 15 December and although the Senegal international has registered nine goals in 20 league matches so far this campaign, he has been heavily criticised over the past few weeks.

arts.sum: Real Madrid can go top of La Liga if they defeat Las Palmas, but the chances of this happening have taken a blow as the visitors have an early lead at the Santiago Bernabeu. arts.ttl: Chelsea receive several loan offers for 'creative' attacker, the Blues have already decided what to do - journalist
Attacker makes decision on future as Arsenal, Liverpool, and Chelsea initiate contact
arts.sum: Bayern Munich attacker Jamal Musiala has been linked with a move away from the club in recent months. According to TBR Football, Arsenal, Liverpool and Chelsea were keen on securing his signature and they have been in contact with his representatives as well.
